resource.string: #@CCKCs.NET Blog io HK launched in 2026. This personal blog shares the blogger’s life, skills, and aspirations. It highlights individuality, dedication, and future career plans while offering readers insight into the blogger’s journey.

#@CCKCs.NET Blog io HK launched in 2026 on GitHub. It is a personal HTML/CSS/JS blog showcasing the blogger’s life, skills, and long-term career plans. The site provides a gateway for readers to learn about the blogger’s background, knowledge, dedication, and aspirations.

#@CCKCs.NET Blog io HK is a blog-like HTML/CSS/JS site created by Cyrus CHUI (CHUI KA CHUN), a Hongkonger interested in software, systems, web, and API development. Cyrus is currently studying Software Engineering and is active in local scouting. This blog documents the path from vocational programmer to senior roles and beyond.
resource.author: cyruschuikc <cyruschuikc-kamisatokira@outlook.com>
